description_long: This chaise features a long, rectangular seating surface with one end smoothly rounded, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The top surface appears to be made of light-colored wood or wood laminate, providing a natural and warm aesthetic. The chaise is supported by four evenly spaced, straight metal legs with a brushed or matte finish, contributing to its sturdy and functional design. There is no visible backrest or armrests, emphasizing its open and accessible form, suitable for communal or public urban spaces such as parks or plazas. The surface is flat and unadorned, with no visible upholstery, patterns, or additional cushioning, making it easy to clean and maintain. Its overall design is practical, inviting users to sit or recline comfortably in a variety of settings.
description: A minimalist, light wood chaise with a rounded end and four straight metal legs, lacking backrest or armrests. The flat, unadorned surface is ideal for public seating in urban environments.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the chaise and the vertical alignment of the legs.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlighting the flat, rectangular wooden surface with a rounded end and the four supporting metal legs.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, identical to view 0, showing the slim edge and leg placement.
description_view_3: A bottom-up or underside view displaying the arrangement of the four metal legs and the full length of the wooden surface.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no visible backrest on this chaise; the seating surface is entirely flat and open, with no raised or segmented elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of metal with a simple, functional design and a matte or brushed finish. They are evenly spaced and lack decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery or pattern; the surface is a solid, smooth wood or wood-like material.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating surface is a single, continuous, flat wooden panel with no attached or loose cushions.
